attr.title: 2048 Plus
attr.desc: A feature-packed implementation of the classic puzzle game 2048 for PortMaster, built using the LÖVE framework.
attr.inst: Ready to run. Use the D-Pad to move tiles, L1/R1 for power-ups, B to undo, and Y to switch themes.
attr.inst_md: Ready to run. Use the **D-Pad** to move tiles, **L1/R1** for power-ups, **B** to undo, and **Y** to switch themes.
